subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! Today is the day of the blessed Word: "All things have We numbered in a Book." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روز کلمه مبارکه کل شیئ احصیناه کتاباست یا اسمعیل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for detachment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
